identity.mission: Create a relationship intelligence platform that feels like a high-end psychology journal meeting a NASA control center. No generic SaaS gradients. No 'cute' illustrations.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Psychology Journal x Dark Mode Analytics
Emotion First: Data must feel human, not robotic.
Content is King: Every chart tells a relationship story.
Zoom In: Focus on the micro-changes in trust.
Negative Space: Silence is as important as conversation.

rules: Use Fraunces ONLY for major emotional headings (Hero, Section Titles).
Use Manrope for all UI elements, data inputs, and long text.
Use JetBrains Mono for small data labels, timestamps, and indexes.

modes.marketing: Tetris Grid - Asymmetrical, artful, large images.
modes.dashboard: Bento Grid - High density, glass panels, 1px borders.

grid_rules: Never create a symmetrical 2-column grid for the hero.
Dashboard widgets must stretch to fill height (h-full).
Use aspect-ratio classes to force specific shapes.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2EC4B6] text-black hover:bg-[#259F94] rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(46,196,182,0.3)] transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-[#2EC4B6] hover:text-[#259F94] hover:bg-[#2EC4B6]/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg

cards.glass: bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-[#2EC4B6]/30 transition-colors duration-500

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-[#2EC4B6] text-white h-12 rounded-xl px-4 transition-all focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2EC4B6]

charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines. Use gradients for areas. Tooltips must be dark glass.

hero_bg.alt: Abstract white lines network on black background
hero_bg.usage: Hero section background with heavy overlay/opacity

clarity_moment.usage: Background for the Clarity Moment breathing exercise

pattern_engine.usage: Visual for the AI analysis/pattern section

mirror_mode.alt: Silhouette of two figures at sunset
mirror_mode.usage: Illustration for the Perception Gap/Mirror Mode feature

principles: Slow and heavy. Things should feel like they have mass.
Parallax on scroll for background elements.

do_not: Do NOT use gradients for text.
Do NOT use the default Shadcn 'slate' colors. Use the defined palette.
Do NOT center text in the Hero unless it is a specific artistic choice.
Do NOT use aggressive borders. Use 1px with low opacity.
must_do: MUST use 'data-testid' on all interactive elements.
MUST implement a 'Light/Dark' toggle if requested, but default to Dark.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install fonts first. Configure Tailwind theme next. Create the 'Layout' component that handles the background color and global font smoothing.
instructions_to_main_agent.landing_page: Build the Landing Page with the 'Tetris' grid. Use the Hero image with a gradient overlay to ensure text readability.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard: The Deep Analysis flow is a wizard. Use a 'StepIndicator' component. Each step should animate in.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Customize Recharts components to remove axes lines and use custom tooltips.
